title: Garlicky Smoked Polish Salmon Broil
description: A garlicky, tender, and cozy Polish dish featuring smoked salmon, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlic butter (see notes)
ingredients.notes: Use a garlic press to release garlic flavor without actual garlic.

instructions: Line a bamboo tray with aluminum foil, leaving some overhang on the sides for easy cleanup.
Place the smoked salmon on the prepared tray, skin side down.
In a small bowl, mix together the garlic butter ingredients (see notes).
Spread the garlic butter evenly over the salmon, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Season the salmon with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drizzle the olive oil over the salmon, making sure it's evenly coated.
Broil the salmon for 8-10 minutes or until it's cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Remove the salmon from the oven and garnish with fresh parsley and dill, if desired.
Serve the salmon with lemon wedges and capers, if desired.
Optional: Thread the salmon onto bamboo skewers for a fun and easy presentation.
